ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( All_Documents_Complete__c = TRUE, OR( Emirates_ID_Copy__c = FALSE, Passport_Copy__c = FALSE, Visa_Copy__c = FALSE, AECB_Consent_Form__c = FALSE, AND( ISPICKVAL(Employment_Type__c, "Salaried"), Salary_Certificate__c = FALSE ), AND( ISPICKVAL(Employment_Type__c, "Self-Employed"), OR( Trade_License_Self_Employed__c = FALSE, Salary_Certificate__c = FALSE ) ), AND( ISPICKVAL(Employment_Type__c, "Business Owner"), OR( Trade_License_Self_Employed__c = FALSE, Salary_Certificate__c = FALSE ) ) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: All Documents Complete can only be checked when all document checkboxes are ticked.
